falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (key resistance level) on 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breakout confirms trend reversal invalidating consolidation phase assumption

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff Score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Exceeding threshold indicates blowoff top scenario contradicting current HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 fails to achieve 10% price increase from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Pattern match to bottom_2024_aug fails to materialize as expected

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
